0.text: Paraseptal emphysema more prominent in the right lung apex

1.text: Atelectasis extending to the fissure in the posterobasal and laterobasal segments of the left lower lobe

2.text: Scarring changes in both lung apices, more prominent on the right

3.text: Subpleural nodule measuring 8 mm in diameter in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

4.text: Multiple nonspecific nodules in both lungs, largest measuring 5 mm in the right upper lobe
